item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Crisp breaded pork patties, also available gluten free, served with classiccreamed peas and carrots and boiled potatoes, topped with fresh parsley.Mustard and tomato melon salad on the side (1+2+6+11)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Indonesian beef rendang, slow cooked for deep, rich flavour and warmth, withvegetables and served with coconut rice, topped with toasted coconut flakes.Quick pickled cucumber salad and fresh coriander on the side (13+15) GREEN DISH: dish Indonesian kidney bean rendang, rich in warm spices and depth, served withcoconut rice and toasted coconut flakes. Pickled cucumber salad and corianderon the side

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Pan roasted turkey with fresh pesto emulsion, served with pearl barley andkale, topped with blackcurrant crumble and finely chopped chives (1+15) GREEN DISH: dish Chili sin carne, rich and warming, served with rice (15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Jerk chicken with warm spices and a hint of smoke, served with rich dirty riceand vegetables (13+15) GREEN DISH: dish Jerk aubergine with bold spices and soft texture, served with dirty rice

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Juicy Danish meatballs with extra vegetables, served with creamy cold potatosalad with chives, dill, red onion and crisp radishes, topped with pea shoots.Pickled cucumbers and Dijon mustard on the side (1+2+6+11+13) GREEN DISH: Split pea patties with texture and depth, served with creamy potato salad andfresh herbs, topped with pea shoots. Pickled cucumbers and Dijon mustard on theside
